sponsors.rationale: Pune-headquartered global technology company with a strong AI/ML practice. Consistently sponsors major tech conferences in the city.
sponsors.outreach_email:
Dear Persistent Systems Team,

We are organizing a premier Technology conference in Pune, India and believe Persistent Systems would be an ideal strategic partner given your deep roots in Pune's tech ecosystem.

Let's connect to explore sponsorship opportunities.

Best,
ConferenceAI Team

sponsors.rationale: Infosys has a major campus in Pune and actively sponsors regional tech summits to attract talent.
sponsors.outreach_email:
Dear Infosys Team,

We are hosting the premier Tech Conference in Pune and would love to partner with Infosys. Your brand presence in Pune aligns perfectly with our audience of 5,000+ technology professionals.

Kind regards,
ConferenceAI Team

sponsors.rationale: Large India R&D center in Pune, strong interest in community events and developer outreach.
sponsors.outreach_email:
Dear TIBCO Team,

We'd love to have TIBCO as a sponsor for our Pune Technology Conference. Your analytics and integration stack is widely used by our expected audience.

Best,
ConferenceAI Team

sponsors.rationale: Pune is Cummins India's largest base. They invest heavily in STEM education and innovation events.
sponsors.outreach_email:
Dear Cummins India Team,

With Pune being your largest India hub, we'd love to partner for our upcoming Technology Conference. Your CSR focus on STEM makes this a natural fit.

Regards,
ConferenceAI Team

sponsors.rationale: Major Pune presence, strong talent acquisition goals in the tech community.
sponsors.outreach_email:
Dear Syntel Team,

Our Pune Technology Conference offers your team a prime opportunity to showcase capabilities and engage with 5,000+ professionals.

Sincerely,
ConferenceAI Team

speakers.name: Dr. Vijay Bhatkar
speakers.title: Chairman, ETH Research Lab & Param Supercomputer creator
speakers.bio_summary: Legendary Indian computer scientist and creator of India's PARAM supercomputer. Chancellor of Nalanda University and a national icon in technology.

speakers.name: Rashmi Deshpande
speakers.title: VP Engineering
speakers.bio_summary: Engineering leader at one of Pune's largest tech companies, driving AI-integrated product development.

speakers.name: Prof. Bhaskar Ramamurthi
speakers.title: Former Director
speakers.bio_summary: Renowned educator and researcher who led IIT Madras to global rankings and championed deep tech entrepreneurship.

speakers.name: Manish Sabharwal
speakers.title: Co-founder & Executive Vice Chairman
speakers.bio_summary: One of India's foremost voices on labour market and employment, relevant to tech workforce transformation.

agenda_mapping.speaker: Dr. Vijay Bhatkar
agenda_mapping.topic: India's AI Future: From Supercomputing to National AI Mission

agenda_mapping.speaker: Manish Sabharwal
agenda_mapping.topic: The Future of Work in the Age of AI

venues.name: Sahara Star Pune

ticketing.notes: Pune's tech audience is price-sensitive but will pay for premium access. UPI support is essential. Student tier attracts from COEP, Symbiosis, and PICT.

pricing.notes: At 5000 attendees in Pune, this conference is extremely profitable. Consider investing in speaker travel and premium venue.

channels.strategy: Target Pune IT professionals via sponsored posts and native ads. Focus on Persistent, Infosys, TCS Pune employees.
channels.message_template: 🚀 Announcing the Premier Tech Conference Pune 2026! Join 5,000+ professionals for keynotes, workshops & networking. Early bird tickets LIVE!

channels.strategy: Share in Pune-specific developer and startup WhatsApp groups.
channels.message_template: Hey Pune tech fam! Big conference coming up — grab your early bird before it's gone!

channels.strategy: List event on PuneTech — the go-to community portal for Pune's tech community.
channels.message_template: Listing on PuneTech with a community discount code for early bird tickets.

timeline.action: Launch event, open early bird, post on all channels
Speaker announcement, PuneTech feature, LinkedIn ads
Early bird closes, standard opens, WhatsApp blitz
Final speaker reveal, FOMO content push
Logistics email to attendees, last-minute promo

key_messages: Learn from India's top technology leaders
Actionable insights you can implement immediately

day_of: Live streaming setup for remote attendees

risk_mitigation: Generator for power backup at venue
Overflow room for 500+ attendees if registration exceeds capacity
Medical first aid team on site
